article.title: Uber SDE-1 Offer 2025
article.content:
Education: BTech in CSE from Tier-2 College
Years of Experience: 0
Batch : 2025
Prior Experience: Winter Intern at Uber — received a PPO
Date of the Offer: Jun 2025
Company: Uber
Title/Level: Software Engineer I
Location: Bangalore, India

Compensation:
Base: ₹23,00,000
Retirals: ₹1,93,315 (includes Employer PF + Gratuity)
Joining Bonus: ₹2,00,000 (1-year clawback)
New Hire Stock Grant: ₹7,03,538 (USD 33,000 vested over 4 years)
Target Cash Bonus: ₹2,70,000 (performance-linked)
Relocation Allowance: ₹2,00,000

Total CTC: ₹38,66,853

Benefits:
₹7.5L medical (incl. OPD) for self, spouse & 2 kids. Life & accident cover up to 3× base. Annual health check-up. \$68/month for wellness reimbursement. \$50/month Uber travel credits. Mobile: corporate plan or \$50/month. Free meals.

Previous Internship Post: https://leetcode.com/discuss/post/6060773/uber-winter-intern-offer-2025-by-anonymo-7ie1/

post.content: After an interview, in how many days you got a call/email for next round?
can you share your interview experience so that it can help me, I am in the same process.
It\'s 2025 and still people don\'t know how to check the correct CTC.
